HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION

MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Angelique P. Kennedy, aka Angelique C. Dixon, appears as defendant/judgment debtor/claimant, In Propria Persona

No other appearance is made in this matter.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

CLAIM OF EXEMPTION of Angelique C. Dixon is off calendar. The plaintiff did not file a timely opposition with the Sheriff's office.
